violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee * did not wash hands as necessary. - Employees not washing hands as needed. Hand sinks in the back prep area are dry. Employee observed not washing hands before putting gloves on.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floors require more frequent or more thorough cleaning.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
